Build challenge creation form: title, description, type dropdown (UNIQUE_RESTAURANTS, DIVERSE_DISHES, CUISINE_EXPLORATION, SPONSORED), requirements JSON editor (count, specificItems array of MenuItem IDs, deadline optional), reward Foodie Points input, optional gift card reward value, start/end dates, submit creates Challenge record with sponsorRestaurantId. Create menu management: list all menu items by category, add new item form (name, description, price, category, upload photo, dietary tags multi-select: vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free, spicy, etc., isAvailable checkbox), edit existing items (inline editing or modal), delete items (soft delete: isAvailable=false), bulk actions (enable/disable multiple items, update category). Implement analytics dashboard: order trends graph (daily/weekly/monthly revenue, order count), customer demographics (new vs returning, location heatmap), popular menu items (top 10 by order count), points issued vs redeemed chart, average order value, peak order times heatmap, customer reviews/ratings summary. Build customer posts feed: display all SocialPost records where restaurantId matches restaurant, each post shows user profile photo/name, post photos, caption, rating, timestamp, engagement stats (likes, comments, shares), 'Respond' button opens comment modal (restaurant can comment as official account with 'Restaurant' badge), 'Repost' button shares to restaurant's social profile (if implemented). Add restaurant profile editor: update name, description, address, phone, email, website, upload restaurant logo/header image, edit cuisine types multi-select, set price range (1-4), configure loyalty program (enable/disable, pointsPerDollar formula, apiProvider, oauthConfig if available), set QR secret for QR code generation. Implement approval workflow for events/challenges: admin review queue for new restaurants (display pending events/challenges), approve/reject with reason, send email notification to restaurant owner with decision.
tasks.testStrategy: Test restaurant owner login with email/password authentication and role-based access control (UserRole.RESTAURANT_OWNER), verify dashboard home displays accurate stats (orders, revenue, points issued), test event creation form submits successfully and creates Event record with all fields, validate auto-approval for verified restaurants and manual review for new restaurants, test challenge creation form with requirements JSON accepts complex structures (count, specificItems, deadline), verify menu management CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete menu items), test analytics dashboard displays accurate order trends, customer demographics, and popular items, validate customer posts feed shows only posts mentioning the restaurant with correct engagement stats, test 'Respond' button allows restaurant to comment with 'Restaurant' badge, verify restaurant profile editor updates all fields in Restaurant model, test loyalty program configuration saves pointsPerDollar formula and QR secret, validate approval workflow for events/challenges with admin review and email notifications.

tasks.title: Implement Content Moderation System with AI Filters and Manual Review
tasks.description: Build automated content moderation using AI filters for inappropriate content, user reporting system, moderation queue for manual review, and safety features as outlined in PRD section 6.7.15
tasks.details: Integrate AI content filters: use Google Cloud Vision API to detect inappropriate images (nudity, violence, explicit content) on post upload, analyze photos before allowing post creation, if flagged show 'Content policy violation' error and block upload. Implement profanity filter: maintain list of banned words/phrases, scan captions and comments for profanity on submit, automatically replace with asterisks or reject submission, configurable sensitivity levels. Build spam detection: identify repetitive posts (same caption/photo posted multiple times), detect suspicious links in captions/comments, rate limit post creation (max 10 posts/hour, max 50 posts/day), flag accounts with excessive posting for review. Add hate speech detection: use machine learning model or third-party API (Perspective API, Azure Content Moderator) to analyze text for hate speech, toxicity, harassment, if detected flag for manual review and temporarily hide content. Create user reporting system: 'Report' button on all posts and comments, report reasons (Spam, Harassment or bullying, Hate speech or symbols, Violence or dangerous content, Nudity or sexual content, False information, Intellectual property violation, Other), optional details text field, submit report creates flag record in database (SocialPost.isFlagged=true, flagReason), confirmation message 'Thank you, we'll review this'. Build moderation queue dashboard: admin/moderator interface listing all flagged content (posts, comments), display content preview, user info, report reason, report count, AI confidence scores, review actions (Approve: clear flag and make visible, Remove: soft delete content, Warn User: send warning notification, Suspend Account: temporarily disable account for X days, Ban Account: permanently disable), action history log, 24-hour SLA for review. Implement user safety features: Block User (blocked user can't see your posts, can't message you, can't find profile in search, stored in blocklist table), Mute User (don't see user's posts in feed, user doesn't know they're muted, stored in mutelist table), Private Account (only approved followers see posts, new followers require approval), Comment Controls per post (turn off comments checkbox, block specific words in comments with custom filter list, require approval before comments appear with moderated flag). Build account suspension system: temporary suspension (disable login, hide all posts, remove from feeds, show 'Account suspended until [date]' on profile), permanent ban (same as suspension but no expiration, mark account as deleted), appeal process (user can submit appeal via email, admin reviews and can reinstate). Add community guidelines page: display in app and web, outline acceptable behavior, content policies, consequences of violations, how to report, appeal process. Implement automated actions: auto-hide posts with 10+ reports pending review, auto-suspend accounts with 3+ content violations in 30 days, auto-remove comments with high toxicity scores (>0.9 from Perspective API). Track moderation metrics: total reports received, average review time, action breakdown (approved/removed/warned/suspended), repeat offenders, false positive rate.
tasks.testStrategy: Test Google Cloud Vision API detects inappropriate images (nudity, violence) and blocks upload with error message, verify profanity filter scans captions/comments and replaces banned words with asterisks, validate spam detection identifies repetitive posts and rate limits excessive posting (10/hour, 50/day), test hate speech detection flags toxic content for manual review, verify user reporting system creates flag record with correct reason and increments report count, test moderation queue displays all flagged content with preview and AI confidence scores, validate review actions (Approve, Remove, Warn, Suspend, Ban) execute correctly and log history, ensure 24-hour SLA alerts for unreviewed flagged content, test Block User prevents blocked user from viewing profile, messaging, and searching, verify Mute User hides posts in feed without notification, validate Private Account requires follower approval before access, test Comment Controls per post (disable comments, block words, require approval), verify account suspension disables login and hides posts until expiration or permanent ban, test appeal process allows user to submit appeal and admin to review/reinstate, validate automated actions (auto-hide with 10+ reports, auto-suspend with 3+ violations, auto-remove high toxicity comments) trigger correctly.

tasks.title: Optimize Mobile App Performance and Implement Offline Support
tasks.description: Enhance app performance with image optimization, lazy loading, infinite scroll virtualization, caching strategies, offline mode, and analytics tracking as per PRD section 12.9
tasks.details: Implement image optimization pipeline: client-side compression using expo-image-manipulator before upload (reduce to 2MB max), generate multiple resolutions on backend (Thumbnail 200x200, Feed 1080x1350, Full original) using Sharp library, store in S3 with CloudFront CDN, progressive JPEG format for fast loading, WebP format for newer devices (smaller file size), lazy loading with react-native-fast-image or expo-image (load images as user scrolls, blur placeholder while loading). Optimize video processing: transcode videos to H.264 codec for compatibility using FFmpeg, generate thumbnail from first frame, create multiple bitrates (480p, 720p, 1080p) for adaptive streaming, audio normalization, store in S3, use HLS/DASH for streaming. Build infinite scroll with virtualization: use @shopify/flash-list (already installed) for feed screens, load 10 posts initially, preload next 10 posts when user reaches 7th post, recycle off-screen components to save memory, track scroll position for back navigation resume. Implement caching strategies: User wallet cache 5 minutes (balance freshness vs performance), Restaurant menus cache 1 hour (infrequent changes), Discovery feed cache 10 minutes (personalized, needs freshness), Leaderboards cache 1 hour (refreshed by background job), use React Query for automatic cache management with stale-while-revalidate pattern, persist cache to AsyncStorage for offline access. Build offline support: cache recent feed posts for offline viewing (last 50 posts), queue actions when offline (like, comment, share, order) using redux-persist offline queue, sync when back online with conflict resolution, display 'Offline Mode' indicator banner at top, retry failed requests with exponential backoff. Optimize API response times: add database indexes on frequently queried fields (userId, restaurantId, createdAt), implement Redis caching for hot data (trending posts, popular restaurants, leaderboards), use database read replicas for read-heavy queries, compress API responses with gzip, use pagination with cursor-based navigation for large datasets. Implement performance monitoring: integrate Sentry for error tracking and performance monitoring, track API response times with New Relic or similar, monitor app launch time (<3s target), track screen load times, measure JS bundle size and optimize with code splitting, track memory usage and detect leaks. Add analytics tracking: integrate Mixpanel or Firebase Analytics, track user events (screen views, button taps, feature usage), track conversion funnels (signup, first order, first post, first challenge), track retention metrics (DAU, WAU, MAU, cohort retention), track performance metrics (time spent on feed, posts viewed, engagement rate). Implement A/B testing framework: use Optimizely or similar for feature flags, test feed algorithm variations, test UI component variations (button colors, CTAs), measure impact on engagement and conversion metrics. Optimize bundle size: enable Hermes engine for faster startup, tree shaking to remove unused code, lazy load screens with React.lazy and Suspense, analyze bundle with react-native-bundle-visualizer, split large libraries into chunks.
tasks.testStrategy: Test image optimization reduces file sizes to <2MB before upload, verify multiple resolutions generated and served via CloudFront CDN, validate lazy loading only fetches images when scrolled into view with blur placeholder, test video processing transcodes to H.264 and generates thumbnails correctly, verify infinite scroll loads 10 posts initially and preloads next batch at 7th post, test virtualization with FlashList recycles components and maintains smooth 60fps scroll, validate caching strategies with correct TTLs (wallet 5min, menu 1hr, feed 10min), test offline mode caches recent posts and queues actions (like, comment), verify offline queue syncs successfully when back online with conflict resolution, test database query performance with indexes on userId, restaurantId, createdAt fields (<100ms target), validate Redis caching improves hot data access times (trending posts, leaderboards), test API response compression with gzip reduces payload sizes by 60-80%, verify performance monitoring captures errors and slow API calls in Sentry, test analytics tracking sends correct events (screen views, taps, conversions) to Mixpanel, validate A/B testing framework assigns users to variants and tracks results, test bundle size optimizations reduce app size by 20-30% with Hermes and code splitting, ensure app launch time <3 seconds on mid-range devices.
